channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Jury Rules Against Ticketmaster Parent Company for Illegal Monopoly Practices
item.description: A United States jury has found Live Nation Entertainment, the parent company of Ticketmaster, guilty of running an illegal monopoly over the live events industry. The verdict marks a major blow to one...

item.title: Trump considers ending UK-US trade deal after Starmer refuses to support Iran war
item.description: President Donald Trump don warn say he fit tear up the trade deal wey United States and United Kingdom sign in 2025. The matter start as tension dey rise because Prime Minister Keir Starmer refuse to ...

item.title: UK government expands energy support scheme for large manufacturers from April 2027
item.description: The UK government has announced an expansion of its British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme (BICS) to provide additional support to large energy-intensive manufacturers, starting from April 2027. Th...

item.title: SIU seizes luxury assets linked to Tembisa Hospital corruption investigation
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has secured attachment orders against a fleet of luxury vehicles and several upmarket properties belonging to businessman Hangwani Maumela, who is alleged to have ...

item.title: A restrained and routine Prime Minister’s Questions sees Starmer and Badenoch trade cautious blows
item.description: John Crace’s sketch of this week’s Prime Minister’s Questions portrays a surprisingly subdued exchange between Keir Starmer and Kemi Badenoch. After weeks of sterile confrontation, both leaders showed...

item.title: Delhi Court Summons Robert Vadra and Eight Others in Shikohpur Land Deal Money Laundering Case
item.description: A Delhi court has taken cognisance of charges against businessman Robert Vadra in connection with a money laundering case related to the Shikohpur land transaction in Gurgaon. The Enforcement Director...

item.title: Iran deployed Chinese satellite to assist targeting of US military bases
item.description: Leaked military documents indicate that Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) secretly obtained a Chinese satellite, TEE-01B, in late 2024, giving the nation advanced surveillance capabiliti...

item.title: Majority of NHS patients face recurring administrative issues
item.description: A recent study has highlighted that approximately two-thirds of patients in the UK encountered at least one administrative problem with the NHS in the past year. The issues reported include delays in ...

item.title: DENR reports Metro Manila air quality stable after Navotas landfill fire
item.description: The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) has announced that Metro Manila’s air quality has gone back to good and fair levels following last week’s landfill fire in Navotas. According...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Meets Saudi Crown Prince, Discusses Economic Support and Regional Peace Efforts
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif visited Jeddah and met with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman for a nearly two-hour discussion on regional and bilateral matters. During the cordial meeting, PM Sheh...

item.title: Two individuals arrested over attempted arson at North London synagogue
item.description: Authorities in North London have apprehended two individuals in connection with an attempted arson at a local synagogue. The incident occurred in the early hours and prompted a swift response from the...

item.title: Trump faces backlash after posting AI image featuring himself with Jesus dressed as pope
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump sparked controversy after sharing an image online portraying himself side by side with Jesus, both dressed in papal attire. The digitally created picture immediately...

item.title: Eric Trump to Join Father on Official Visit to China in Supportive Role
item.description: Washington ki khabar hai ke Donald Trump ka beta, Eric Trump, jo family business ka head hai, apne walid ke sath China ka safar karega jo 14 aur 15 May ko hone wala hai. Eric aur unki wife Lara sirf p...

item.title: Iran Sentences Female Protester to Death Amidst Crackdown on Unrest
item.description: Iran is poised to execute Bita Hemmati, marking the country’s first execution of a female protester linked to the widespread January 2026 uprising in Tehran. Hemmati, along with her husband Mohammadre...

item.title: TSMC’s Profits Surge Amid Soaring Global Demand for AI Chips
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC), the world’s largest producer of advanced chips used in artificial intelligence, is projected to achieve another record-breaking quarter. Analysts expect ...

item.title: Universities challenge government over student loan repayment dispute affecting 22,000 students
item.description: Nine universities in England have launched legal action against the government following a dispute that has left around 22,000 students being told to repay their maintenance loans and childcare grants...

item.title: Identical twins convicted of spying on tenants with hidden cameras
item.description: Identical twin brothers Joshua Rod Tiffen, a former AFP officer, and Kenan Lee Tiffen, an electrician, have been found guilty once more of spying on female tenants in their Canberra home using hidden ...

item.title: Kenya Introduces TouristTap for Easier Digital Payments in Tourism
item.description: Kenya government imeanzisha system mpya ya payment inayoitwa TouristTap ambayo inalenga kurahisisha malipo kwa cashless katika sekta ya utalii. System hii ilizinduliwa Nairobi na itarahisisha malipo k...

item.title: Malema’s Legal Team Disputes Evidence Interpretation Ahead of Sentencing
item.description: Pre-sentencing proceedings in the case involving Julius Malema, leader of the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), have been postponed ahead of the anticipated judgment on Thursday. The case concerns a 20...

item.title: Israeli start-up produces lab-grown chocolate bars using cultured cocoa butter
item.description: An Israeli start-up, Celleste Bio, has achieved a significant milestone in food technology by producing the world’s first lab-grown chocolate bars. Supported by Cadbury-owner Mondelez, the company suc...
